payload.title: Public Workshop 3 - 125th Street Select Bus Service
payload.description: Presentation from the third public workshop for proposed Select Bus Service on 125th Street, covering current conditions, proposed design, parking regulations, traffic analysis, and next steps.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.
